channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: NASA officials sidestepped questions on Artemis II risks—there’s a reason why - Ars Technica
item.description:

  4. NASA to Share Artemis II Flight Readiness Review Update  NASA (.gov)
  5. NASA says its Artemis 2 moon rocket is all fixed up. It could launch astronauts to the moon on April 1  Space

item.description:
1. New Research on Muscle Loss Suggests Humans Will Really Suffer on Mars  Gizmodo

  4. Future Astronauts On The Moon And Mars Face Major Challenge As Healthy Muscle Gravity Threshold Revealed  IFLScience
  5. Scientists Have Just Discovered What Happens to Muscles in Space, And They Did It by Sending 24 Mice into Orbit  The Daily Galaxy

item.title: Earth’s Spin Is Slowing at a Pace Not Seen in Millions of Years—and You Can Guess Why - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. Earth’s Spin Is Slowing at a Pace Not Seen in Millions of Years—and You Can Guess Why  Gizmodo

  4. Polar ice melt is slowing Earth's rotation and lengthening days at an unprecedented rate in the last 3.6 million years  La Brújula Verde
  5. Earth days are getting longer. It has not happened in 3.6 million years  WION
